heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 495 Authorization of appropriations
text: There is authorized to be appropriated, out of any moneys in the Treasury not otherwise appropriated, such sums as may be necessary after the fiscal year beginning to carry out the purposes of this chapter.July 1, 1927
notes: CodificationSection constitutes part of section 3 of act . Remainder of section 3 is classified to sections 494 and 496 of this title.Mar. 3, 1927
